Blackland: who sing ballads of forgotten kings
Duskreach: horsemen who know every stone in the expanse
Sageholt: who craft saga-knots from walrus ivory
Whitewall: guardians of oases sacred to forgotten gods
horsemen who know every stone in the expanse

histories.Blackland: Blackland has stood since the Serpent's Era. Its people remember when the duskfall, a peaceful federation of hill-forts.
histories.Duskreach: Legends say Duskreach was born from the union of a mortal and a spirit of the land. Whether truth or legend, it now is known for its festivals, music, and art.
histories.Sageholt: Founded during the Time of Weeping, Sageholt was once a pilgrimage site for sun-worshippers. Today it endures hard times but its people remain resilient.
histories.Fallenspire: Founded during the Age of Embers, Fallenspire was once a sacred burial ground of an earlier people. Today it endures hard times but its people remain resilient.
histories.Palewold: In the Serpent's Era, settlers from the Far Isles arrived and established Palewold. A dragon was slain in the nearby mountains.
histories.Whitewall: Whitewall has stood since the Age of Ashes. Its people remember when the time of weeping, an abandoned outpost of a fallen empire.

relationships.description: The ruling families of Ironforge (Sageholt) and Hollowbrook (Sageholt) are joined by marriage.
Blood has been spilled between Bracken (Blackland) and Pinehold (Fallenspire) since the assassination of a chieftain.
Hollowbrook (Sageholt) and Stonewall (Palewold) exchange timber for woven cloth via the Timber Trail.
Hollowbrook (Sageholt) and Eagleford (Fallenspire) have long disputed the border meadow for generations.
Blood has been spilled between Pinehold (Fallenspire) and Millbrook (Duskreach) since a disputed inheritance.
Bracken (Blackland) and Fairhaven (Fallenspire) have long argued over access to the sacred grove.
Eagleford (Fallenspire) and Pinehold (Fallenspire) celebrate the Dance of the Masks together each year.
Millbrook (Duskreach) and Wyrmrest (Whitewall) deal in rare herbs and remedies via the Coastal Trading Route.
Bracken (Blackland) and Riverbend (Palewold) celebrate the Bonefire Night together each year.
The ruling families of Embervale (Blackland) and Fairhaven (Fallenspire) are joined by marriage.
Millbrook (Duskreach) and Embervale (Blackland) have long competed for control of the mountain pass.

characters.name: Una
characters.backstory: Trained under a retired adventurer, they became known for swordsmanship beyond their years.

characters.name: Peregrin
characters.backstory: Trained under a wandering sage, they became known for flawless navigation.

characters.name: Gwyn
characters.backstory: A an encounter with a spectral wolf set them on their current path.

characters.name: Veda
characters.backstory: As a child, they saw a ghost in the old ruins.

characters.name: Aelwen
characters.backstory: Trained under a mysterious stranger, they became known for the ability to read ancient script.

characters.name: Niamh
characters.backstory: After a betrayal cost them everything, they swore to never again let harm come to the innocent.

characters.name: Leoric
characters.backstory: They once rebuilt the old watchtower, earning a fearsome reputation.

characters.name: Darian
characters.backstory: They once brewed the strongest ale in three counties, earning a place in the council.

characters.name: Dara
characters.backstory: Born during a dragon sighting, they discovered a hidden talent for healing.

characters.name: Yara
characters.backstory: After a flood washed away their livelihood, they swore to write down every story before it is forgotten.

characters.name: Niall
characters.backstory: After a fire claimed their home, they swore to wander until they find meaning.

characters.name: Roric
characters.backstory: After their mentor disappeared without a trace, they swore to find the truth, no matter the cost.

characters.name: Eldon
characters.backstory: Trained under an exiled noble, they became known for a silver tongue and quick wit.

characters.name: Torian
characters.backstory: As a child, they learned to fish before learning to read.

characters.name: Kael
characters.backstory: After a flood washed away their livelihood, they swore to write down every story before it is forgotten.

characters.name: Ilara
characters.backstory: A a stranger whispered their true name to them set them on their current path.

characters.name: Ivor
characters.backstory: After their mentor disappeared without a trace, they swore to wander until they find meaning.

characters.name: Willow
characters.backstory: They once rebuilt the old watchtower, earning the respect of their peers.

characters.name: Zelda
characters.backstory: Born during a blood moon, they earned the trust of the village elders.

characters.name: Kira
characters.backstory: Trained under a retired adventurer, they became known for a silver tongue and quick wit.

characters.name: Hestia
characters.backstory: They once defended a village from raiders, earning a fearsome reputation.

characters.name: Zephyr
characters.backstory: They once mapped an unmapped valley, earning a loyal following.

characters.name: Fenna
characters.backstory: Born during a dragon sighting, they learned to read the land's secrets.

characters.name: Jorik
characters.backstory: Born during a harvest festival, they read every scroll in the settlement's library.

events.name: The Millbrook Pact
events.description: A unprecedented flood struck Duskreach, destroying a season's harvest. The people rebuilt, stronger than before..
consequences: A new leader emerged from the crisis.

events.name: The Ironforge Pact
events.description: A severe drought struck Sageholt, destroying a season's harvest. The scars remained, but so did the stories..

events.name: The Ironforge Crisis
events.description: The a discontented noble's army launched an attack on Ironforge over a broken trade agreement. The invaders were driven back to their own lands.
consequences: The scars remained, but so did the stories.

quests.name: The Wyrmrest Expedition
quests.description: Venture into the Whispering Woods to hunt down the source of the trouble. The location is said to be hidden, but the locals know the way.

quests.name: The Riverbend Task
quests.description: Strange laughter echoes from the abandoned mill at midnight around the Palewold area. Kira Fairwind suspects nothing good — and wants answers before it is too late. Investigate discreetly.
rewards: a favour from the local lord

quests.name: The Eagleford Quest
quests.description: Kael Underhill needs a message delivered to Ironforge regarding a proposed marriage alliance. The message must be delivered by hand as a sign of respect.

eras.name: Crimson Century
eras.description: a succession crisis weakened Palewold. The temples stood empty, their priests gone.. The old council crumbled.

events.name: The Covenant at Embervale
events.description: The Great Earthquake reshaped Palewold forever.

eras.name: The Broken Years
eras.description: In the beginning, Fallenspire raised the first walls against the unknown. The first settlements of Fallenspire drew traders and travellers from afar.

events.name: The Cataclysm at the Rising Pass
events.description: The Mountain That Breathed Smoke reshaped Fallenspire forever.

eras.name: The Fallen Turning
eras.description: The faith and revelation defined this era. Palewold perfected the art of glass-blowing. The Pilgrim's Cathedral was completed after 5 years of labour..

events.name: The Discovery at Fairhaven
events.description: Kira Fairwind established Fairhaven's Forge as a forge for the weapons of the age.

eras.name: The Rising Turning
eras.description: A time of peace that let the population flourish. Sageholt raised the Great Library of Wyrmrest. The Golden Forest became a symbol of hope.

events.name: The Battle at Wyrmrest
events.description: Yara Nightwalker discovered the remains of an ancient civilization in Sageholt.

eras.name: The Shadows of Dreams
eras.description: Division tore through Sageholt. a dispute over the succession. The Silent Alliance and The Star Party became bitter enemies, their feud lasting generations.

events.name: The Battle at Stonewall
events.description: The The Crown Accord was sworn by Dara Crowheart and the The First Faction at Stonewall.

eras.name: Era of the Roots
eras.description: The Withering Blight swept across the land. Millbrook was reduced to rubble and ash. The the land itself was changed forever.

events.name: The Founding at the First Valley
events.description: The Great Earthquake reshaped Sageholt forever.

eras.name: The First Turning
eras.description: In the beginning, Duskreach settled along the river valleys. The first settlements of Duskreach grew from scattered camps into proper villages.

events.name: The Covenant at the Broken Shore
events.description: Leoric Ashwood established Fairhaven's Academy as a forge for the weapons of the age.

magic.name: The Arcane Weave of The Fair Shire
magic.description: Raw magical energy drawn from the fabric of reality itself. Studied through years of disciplined scholarship.

schools.name: Evocation
schools.description: The school of raw energy — destruction, force, and direct power.

schools.name: Transmutation
schools.description: The school of change — transformation, alchemy, and reshaping.

schools.name: Abjuration
schools.description: The school of protection — wards, barriers, and dispelling.

schools.name: Necromancy
schools.description: The school of death and undeath — spirits, decay, and the forbidden.

traditions.name: Silver Sect of The Hoar Reach
traditions.description: A secret tradition practiced in the Sageholt region, amidst the frozen wastes.
traditions.practitioners: Practitioners of Silver Sect of The Hoar Reach

traditions.name: Storm Ring of The Flint Tribes

traditions.practitioners: Practitioners of Storm Ring of The Flint Tribes

traditions.name: Pearl Path of The Bone Tribes
traditions.description: A wandering tradition practiced in the Duskreach region, amidst the sun-scorched wastes.
traditions.practitioners: Practitioners of Pearl Path of The Bone Tribes

traditions.name: Twilight Sisterhood of The Glen Valley
traditions.description: A ancient tradition practiced in the Blackland region, amidst the temperate forests and fields.
traditions.practitioners: Practitioners of Twilight Sisterhood of The Glen Valley

traditions.name: Dusk Order of Reef Dominion
traditions.description: A secret tradition practiced in the Fallenspire region, amidst the lush jungles.
traditions.practitioners: Practitioners of Dusk Order of Reef Dominion
